message:
test(proptest): add 29 property tests for perf_build and resources modules (bd-3ar8v.8)

9 proptests for perf_build: allocator resolution invariants, profile
detection from target paths, env override priority, kind stability.

20 proptests for resources: validate_name (valid, uppercase, hyphens,
consecutive hyphens, length), validate_description (in-limit, over-limit),
escape_xml (idempotent, no raw specials), parse_command_args (round-trip,
quoted), substitute_args (positional, $@, $ARGUMENTS equivalence),
parse_frontmatter (no-dashes, unclosed, closed), resolve_path (absolute,
relative), dedupe_paths (first-occurrence order, uniqueness).

Total lib tests: 4792 (up from 4763).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
